description: Start your journey with C#, a powerful, modern language used for everything from web apps to game development.

slides.title: Welcome to C# 🎼
slides.content:
# The Sharpest tool 🔪

C# (pronounced **C-Sharp**) is a modern, object-oriented language developed by **Microsoft**.

## Why C#?
- **Versatile:** Build Desktop, Web (ASP.NET), Mobile (Maui), and Games (Unity).
- **Safe:** Type-safe and memory-safe (Garbage Collection).
- **Evolving:** Constant updates (.NET 8+).

slides.title: Hello World
Input and Output
slides.content:
# Talking to Console 🗣️

## Output
```csharp
Console.Write("No new line ");
Console.WriteLine("With new line");
```

## Input
Reads a **string** from the user.
```csharp
string name = Console.ReadLine();
```

slides.title: Method Check
slides.content: Which method prints text to the console and moves the cursor to the next line?

String Interpolation
Type Conversion
Full Example: Greeter
Keyword Check
slides.content: Which keyword lets the compiler infer the variable type?

slides.title: Summary
slides.content:
# Recap: C# Basics 🎓

You've taken the first step into the .NET world!

## Key Takeaways
- **Structure:** `using`, `namespace`, `class`, `Main`.
- **Console:** `WriteLine`, `ReadLine`.
- **Types:** `int`, `string`, `bool`, etc.
- **Inference:** `var` keyword.
- **Conversion:** `Convert.ToInt32()` or `int.Parse()`.

Next, we dive straight into **Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)** in C#!
